---
title: "Samuel Schapiro"
description-meta: "Quarto Academic Website Template adapted by Dr. Gang He"
image: "files/images/new_headshot.jpg"
page-navigation: false
toc: false
#sidebar: false
page-layout: full

about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image-width: 70%
  links:
    # - icon: sun
    #   text: Group
    #   href: https://spiralworks.ai
    #   target: _blank
    - icon: globe
      text: Bio
      href: https://simons.berkeley.edu/people/sam-schapiro
      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: E-mail
      href: mailto:sam@priorcomputers.ai
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/samuel-schapiro
      target: _blank
    # - icon: youtube
    #   text: YouTube
    #   href: https://www.youtube.com     
    #   target: _blank 
    # - text: "{{< ai orcid >}} ORCID"   # use academic icons, "" are needed, you also need to install the fontawesome extension
    #   href: https://orcid.org
    #   target: _blank
    # - text: "{{< ai clarivate >}} Web of Science"
    #   href: https://www.webofscience.com  
    #   target: _blank
    # - text: "{{< ai scopus >}} Scopus"
    #   href: https://www.scopus.com
    #   target: _blank
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar >}} Google Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=B2UNU6EAAAAJ&hl=en
      target: _blank
#    - text: "{{< ai researchgate >}} Research Gate"
#      href: https://www.researchgate.net
#      target: _blank

listing:   # Comment the listing section and delete corresponding lines in the index.qmd file to remove the recent posts
  - id: recent-posts
    contents: 
      - posts
      - posts/post-links.yml
    exclude:
      title: ""
    type: grid
    max-items: 3
#    image-height: 150px
    page-size: 3 #set same as max-times to remove the page number setting
    fields: [image, date, title, subtitle]
    max-description-length: 75
    sort: 
      - "date desc"
      - "title asc"
---

:::{#hero-heading}

### Bio and Research Interests
I am an [interdisciplinary scholar](bookshelf.html) studying the science of intelligence. I am currently interested in 

1. Understanding the **foundations of creativity**--namely, how it is implemented in minds and machines
2. Developing **AI methods** and systems that exhibit creative behavior

Previously, I was a researcher at the [Simons Institute for the Theory of Computing, Berkeley](https://simons.berkeley.edu/homepage). I did my undergrad at the [University of Illinois, Urbana-Champaign](https://siebelschool.illinois.edu/), where I studied theoretical computer science.

<!-- ### Currently
Founding research scientist at [Prior Computers](https://www.priorcomputers.ai), the machine psychology company. -->

### Select Publications

#### Foundations of Creativity
- **S. Schapiro**, J. Black, L. R. Varshney, [Transformational Creativity in Science: A Graphical Theory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.18687), in the Proceedings of the 16th International Conference on Computational Creativity, 2025. **[Best Short Paper Award]**
- **S. Schapiro**, A. Gladstone, J. Black, H. Ji. [Do Semantic Distance Tests _Actually_ Predict Creativity in LLMs?](files/SD.pdf), Under Review at the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning, 2026.
- **S. Schapiro**, S. Shashidhar, A. Gladstone, J. Black, R. Moon, D. Hakkani-Tur, L. R. Varshney, [Combinatorial Creativity: A New Frontier in Generalization Abilities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.21043), Under Review at 16th International Conference on Learning Representations, 2026.

#### Creative AI Systems
- **S. Schapiro**, C. Francisco Park, F. Sosa, L. R. Varshney, [CreativityNeuro: Steering Large Language Weights to Improve Divergent Thinking](files/CN.pdf), Under Review at Third Conference on Language Modeling, 2026.
- A. Sanyal, **S. Schapiro**, S. Shashidhar, R. Moon, L. R. Varshney, D. Hakkani-Tur, [Spark: A System for Scientifically Creative Idea Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.20090), in the Proceedings of the 16th International Conference on Computational Creativity, 2025.

### Service
- Reviewer at ICML 2026, COLM 2026, NeurIPS 2026, NeurIPS 2024 (Workshop on Creativity & Generative AI)

:::


<!-- Delete the following section and delete corresponding lines in the yaml part to remove the recent posts -->
## Recent Posts
Check out the latest &nbsp;[Papers](posts.qmd#category=paper)&nbsp;, &nbsp;[News](posts.qmd#category=news)&nbsp;, &nbsp;[Events](posts.qmd#category=event)&nbsp;, and &nbsp;[More »](/posts.qmd)

:::{#recent-posts}
:::

<p align="right">[All Posts »](/posts.qmd)</p>
